must_do.full_text:
Grok Build is now fully open source, and SpaceXAI has made its privacy-first approach even stronger

SpaceXAI has officially:
• Open-sourced the Grok Build harness CLI
• Reset usage limits for all users
• Disabled data retention by default
• Deleted all previously retained
must_do.summary: Grok Build开源，SpaceXAI强化隐私优先策略：开源CLI工具、重置用户额度、默认禁用数据保留、删除历史数据。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：开源发布
反常识/意外性：大厂主动删数据、强化隐私
angles: Grok Build终于开源了，SpaceX AI隐私政策反转
AI工具隐私竞速：Grok主动删数据、重置额度
开源+隐私优先，Grok Build如何挑战闭源AI

must_do.full_text:
Introducing Kimi K3: Open Frontier Intelligence

🔹 2.8 Trillion Parameters, 1 Million Context, Native Multimodal
🔹 Kimi Delta Attention enables up to 6.3x faster decoding in million-token contexts
🔹 Attention Residuals deliver ~25% higher training efficiency at <2% additional https://t.co/eFHEbdxn3P
must_do.summary: Kimi K3发布：2.8万亿参数、百万token上下文、原生多模态。Delta Attention技术实现百万token场景下6.3倍解码加速，训练效率提升25%。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：新模型发布
有明确数字：2.8T参数、6.3x加速、25%效率提升
angles: Kimi K3突袭：百万token下快6倍，参数翻新到2.8T
Delta Attention黑科技揭秘：如何让大模型推理快25%
对标GPT-4o：Kimi K3原生多模态+超长上下文实战对比

must_do.full_text:
Big news: Kimi-K3 by @Kimi_Moonshot is now #1 in the Frontend Code Arena with 1679 pts, surpassing Claude Fable 5.

This is a 17-place jump from Kimi-k2.6 (#18 -> #1).

In Frontend, Kimi-K3 ranked #1 in 6 of 7 domains: Brand & Marketing, Reference-Based Design, Data & Analytics, https://t.co/Oa6teaQnWp
must_do.summary: Kimi-K3由月之暗面推出，在Frontend Code Arena排名跃升至第1名（1679分），超越Claude Fable 5，较前代K2.6上升17位。在7个领域中6个排名第一。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：排名第一、超越竞品
有明确数据：1679分、17位跳升、6/7领域第一
angles: Kimi-K3终于登顶：超越Claude，17位逆袭的背后

Official In benchmarks, Kimi k3 is reportedly just behind GPT-5.6 and Fable 5, but ahead of Opus 4.8. 

However, in terms of price, it’s on par with Sonnet 5. An absolute game changer.

Insane! https://t.co/4PoUxDV6e0

must_do.full_text:
Claude Code's /code-review now has effort levels, with the review rewritten at every one.

Low effort beats other code review tools on findings at a fraction of the token cost. High effort delivers significantly higher recall when you want to go deeper.

You pick the tradeoff. https://t.co/uT2K7jfXqQ
must_do.summary: Claude Code推出/code-review功能新增effort levels选项，低档模式在token成本更低的情况下超越竞品，高档模式提供更高召回率。
angles: Claude Code代码审查新功能：低成本高效率vs深度检查
开发者必看：Claude Code effort levels如何降低token成本
代码审查工具对比：Claude Code新功能碾压竞品

priority.full_text:
だいぶ前に、Claude Codeは自分では触らないと決めた。
理由は、普段からコードに縁がない文系弁護士がClaude Codeを使ったとて、生み出せる価値がしれてるので。

それよりも、やばいのはObsidianだ。
文系のAI使いに欠かせない最強ツールだと思う。 https://t.co/TCiZJKYsew
priority.summary: 日本律师分享Claude Code使用心得，推荐Obsidian为文科AI用户必备工具。
